top_negative_themes: Excessive ads on free tier and ads in premium
critical_issues: Data loss after update (e.g., entire library deleted)
action_items: Fix data loss bug: Investigate and patch the update process that causes library deletion. Example: user lost 500+ songs after update.
Resolve app crashes: Address crashes when opening playlists. Example: user reinstalled three times but still crashes.
Remove ads from premium: Ensure no ads are shown to paying subscribers. Example: user reported ads for Spotify products while on premium plan.
executive_summary: Our app is facing critical stability and trust issues. Users are experiencing data loss, frequent crashes, and ads in the premium tier, leading to frustration and declining satisfaction. While music selection and interface are praised, these negative experiences are overshadowing the positives. Immediate action is needed to fix data loss bugs, improve app stability, and uphold the premium ad-free promise to retain users.
